title: mentha carmelitana
intro: Mentha carmelitana, also known as Carmelite mint, is a species of mint that belongs to the Lamiaceae family of plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of menthol and other volatile oils. The medicinal properties of Mentha carmelitana have been found to provide various health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
